keynotes.text: A SYNOPTIC KEY OF THE MATERIA MEDICA By Cyrus Maxwell BOGER Presented by Médi-T REPERTORY COUGH. Cough : Aco., Ars., Bell., Bry., Carb-v., Caust., Cham., Chin., Cina., Coc-c., Con., Dros. , Hep. , Hyo., Ign., Ip., Kali-c., Lach., Lyc., Merc., Nat-m., Nux-v., Pho. , Pul. , Rum., Sang., Sep., Spo., Stan., Sul. Cough, cold drinks , agg. : Calc-c., Hep., Sil., Sul., Ver-a. Cough, cold drinks, amel. : Caust., Coc-c., Cup., Tab. Cough, convulsions , with : Cina., Cup., Lach., Meph., Stram. Cough, deep : Dros., Hep., Spo., Stan., Ver-a., Verb. Cough, dry , expectoration, without : Aco., Ip., Nux-v., Pho., Spo., Sul. Cough, exhausting : Carb-v., Pho., Ver-a. Cough, expectoration , amel. : Ant-t., Ap., Aral., Coc-c., Grind., Kali-bi., Sep., Stan., Zin. Cough, flatus passing, amel. : Sang. Cough, foul air , coughs up : Calc-c., Caps., Culx., Lach., Mez., Sang., Sep., Sul. Cough, incessant : Aco., Alu., Caust., Cham., Chin., Cof., Cup., Dros., Hyo., Ip., Kali-c., Lach., Nux-v., Pho-ac., Pul., Rhus-t., Rum., Sep., Spo., Squil. Cough, larynx , pressure on, agg. : Cina. Cough, loose ; expectoration, with : Ars., Calc-c., Led., Lyc., Pho., Pul., Sep., Stan. Cough, loose ; expectoration, in morning : Carb-v., Hep., Par., Pho., Pul., Sep., Squil., Sul-ac. Cough, loose ; expectoration, by day : Ars., Calc-c., Cham., Hep., Merc., Pul., Sil. Cough, loose ; expectoration, difficult : Ant-t., Caust., Kali-bi. Cough, loose ; expectoration, easy : Arg-m., Stan. Cough, loose ; expectoration, flies from mouth : Arg-n., Bad., Chel., Kali-c., Kali-m., Mang., Mez. Cough, loose ; expectoration, excessive : Coc-c. Cough, loose ; expectoration, night, at : Sep. Cough, loose ; expectoration, swallowed, must be : Caust., Lach. Cough, loose ; taste of. see Taste in General. Cough, lying , agg. : Ars., Hyo., Pul. Cough, painful : Aco., Bell., Bry., Caps., Caust., Dros., Kali-c., Nat-m., Nux-v., Pho., Rhus-t., Seneg., Spo., Squil., Stan., Sul. Cough, short : Aco., Caust., Merc., Rhus-t. Cough, spasmodic , violent, whooping, etc. : Bell., Carb-v., Cina., Coc-c., Cor-r., Cup., Dros., Ip., Jus., Meph., Nux-v., Pul., Stram., Ver-a. Cough, spasmodic, violent, whooping, etc., catarrhal phase : Aco., Dulc., Ip., Nux-v., Pul. Cough, spasmodic, violent, whooping, etc., spasmodic phase : Carb-v., Cina., Coc-c., Dros., Kali-c., Nux-v., Pul., Ver-a. Cough, spasmodic, violent, whooping, etc., defervescent stage : Ant-t., Pho., Pul. Cough, stomach , epigastrium or abdomen, from : Ant-c., Bell., Bry., Ign., Kali-m., Lach., Nat-m., Nit-ac., Pul., Rum., Sang., Sep. Cough, suffocating , choking : Ant-t., Brom., Carb-v., Cup., Dros., Ip., Meph., Op., Spo., Stram., Sul. Cough, throat or larynx , from : Aco., Amb., Calc-c., Cham., Con., Hep., Ip., Kali-c., Lach., Nat-m., Nux-v., Pho., Rum., Sang., Sep. Cough, tickling : Aco., Arn., Cham., Dros., Hyo., Iod., Ip., Lach., Nux-v., Pho-ac., Pho., Rhus-t., Rum., Sang., Sep., Stan., Sul. Cough, vomiting , with : Alu., Ant-t., Bry., Carb-v., Coc-c., Cor-r., Dros., Fer., Ip., Nux-v., Pul. Cough, walking fast, agg. : Sep. Cough, time , morning : Lyc. Cough, time, morning and evening : Aco., Bor., Calc-c., Carb-v., Caust., Cina., Fer., Ign., Lyc., Merc., Nat-m., Pho., Rhus-t., Sep., Sil., Stram., Ver-a. Cough, time, evening : Bry., Calc-c., Nux-v., Rhus-t., Sep. Cough, time, night : Bar-c., Bell., Calc-c., Con., Hyo., Nux-v., Pho., Pul. Cough, time, night, dry : Hyo. Cough, time, at same hour : Lyc., Saba. Copyright © Médi-T 1999
